LanguageData.VQE_RaiderDrone.label: raider drone
LanguageData.VQE_RaiderDrone.description: An automated drone designed for close-quarters raiding and heavy suppression. Equipped with a high-capacity rattlegun, its slow, heavily armored frame allows it to stand its ground and saturate an area with continuous fire, suppressing enemy positions.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. Unlike other drones, raider drones don’t require connection to drone transmitters.
LanguageData.VQE_RaiderDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
